sections.title: Terms of Service
sections.content: Welcome to the BlackOak Real Estate website. By accessing and using this website, you agree to comply with and be bound by the following terms and conditions of use. Please review these terms carefully before using this website.

sections.title: Use of Website
sections.content: The content of this website is for your general information and use only. It is subject to change without notice. This website uses cookies to monitor browsing preferences. Neither we nor any third parties provide any warranty or guarantee as to the accuracy, timeliness, performance, completeness, or suitability of the information and materials found or offered on this website for any particular purpose.

sections.title: Property Information
sections.content: All property details, prices, and specifications displayed on this website are indicative and subject to change without prior notice. BlackOak Real Estate makes every effort to ensure the accuracy of property listings but does not guarantee that all information is current or complete.

sections.title: Intellectual Property
sections.content: This website contains material which is owned by or licensed to us. This material includes, but is not limited to, the design, layout, look, appearance, and graphics. Reproduction is prohibited other than in accordance with the copyright notice, which forms part of these terms and conditions.

sections.title: Limitation of Liability
sections.content: Your use of any information or materials on this website is entirely at your own risk. It shall be your own responsibility to ensure that any products, services, or information available through this website meet your specific requirements.
